notes: Clean public seed corpus; NVIDIA explicitly cites the French v12 slice at about 710h.
Strong public audiobook seed; the public French pool appears materially larger than the NVIDIA-used subset.
Public parliamentary speech; the official dataset appears larger than the slice NVIDIA used.
Huge French audiobook pool and the best obvious scale-up candidate, but file-level licenses are mixed and need filtering.
Small but valuable accent-diversity add-on under Apache 2.0; good robustness supplement, not a core scale source.

dataset_name: TCOF (Traitement de Corpus Oraux en Francais)
notes: Useful spontaneous French speech, but the noncommercial license needs policy review before training use.
Public standardized multilingual benchmark; strong eval set, not a serious scaling source.
Classic French broadcast-news lane distributed through ELRA rather than public-open.
French TV and radio benchmark with more spontaneous speech than read and audiobook sets.
Clear commercial telephony-scale French option if cleaner phone or domain coverage is needed.
Smaller conversational-phone add-on that helps domain balance more than raw scale.
